name: Arlen Bales
title: The Painted Man
description: A young man from Tibbet's Brook who tattooed combat wards onto his flesh. The most dangerous human alive.

signature_ability.name: Painted Man's Fury
signature_ability.description: Combat wards flare across Arlen's skin. Massive melee combo that hits all enemies.

passive_ability.name: Ward Skin
passive_ability.description: Arlen's tattoos glow during night. +20% all damage at night.

loyalty_dialogue.50: I've been watching you fight. You've got something.
loyalty_dialogue.75: You remind me why I do this.
loyalty_dialogue.100: I've been alone a long time. Not anymore.

name: Leesha Paper
title: Herb Gatherer
description: The daughter of Tibbet's Brook's herb gatherer. Brilliant, stubborn, and the best healer you'll ever meet.

recruitment.description: Help Leesha gather rare nightbloom herbs before dusk

signature_ability.name: Apothecary's Miracle
signature_ability.description: Leesha mixes a legendary compound. Fully heals all party members and removes all status effects.

passive_ability.name: Herb Lore
passive_ability.description: Leesha identifies all herbs automatically. Healing items are 50% more effective.

loyalty_dialogue.10: I can handle myself, thank you.
loyalty_dialogue.30: You're not as reckless as I thought.
loyalty_dialogue.50: I'm glad you came for me that night.
loyalty_dialogue.75: You're the only one who listens to me.
loyalty_dialogue.100: I've made my choice. I choose this road, with you.

moral_conflict: She disapproves of hora weapons and demon-eating moral choices. Loyalty -10 each time.

name: Rojer Inn
title: Jongleur
description: A traveling performer who discovered his fiddle music has power over demons. Cheerful on the surface, haunted underneath.

recruitment.description: Help Rojer perform at the Cutter's Hollow inn and survive a night coreling attack together

signature_ability.name: Warded Chorus
signature_ability.description: Rojer plays a song woven through with ward-symbols. Party gains +30% all stats for 3 turns. All enemies confused.

passive_ability.name: Fiddle Charm
passive_ability.description: At the start of each night defense, Rojer plays a tune that delays the first wave by 15 seconds.

loyalty_dialogue.10: As long as there's coin in it... I'm kidding. Mostly.
loyalty_dialogue.30: You know, you're not bad company for someone who never smiles.
loyalty_dialogue.50: I've been running my whole life. Maybe it's time to stop.
loyalty_dialogue.75: I play for them. The ones who didn't make it.
loyalty_dialogue.100: This is the best audience I've ever had. The worst demons, the best audience.

relationship.description: Rojer and Leesha have unresolved feelings. Choice events affect both their loyalties.

name: Renna Tanner
title: Hunter
description: A farm girl turned fierce warrior. She's tasted hora and discovered the power it gives. The cost, she tries not to think about.

recruitment.description: Save Renna from a coreling ambush on the Messenger Road

signature_ability.name: Hora Rage
signature_ability.description: Renna consumes hora, entering a berserk state. Damage x4 for 2 turns, but takes 10% HP per turn.

passive_ability.name: Desperate Fury
passive_ability.description: When HP drops below 25%, attack power +50%.

loyalty_dialogue.30: You fight different from anyone I've met.
loyalty_dialogue.50: The hora... I know what you think. I don't care.
loyalty_dialogue.75: You never judged me. That means something.
loyalty_dialogue.100: I'd follow you into the Core itself.

moral_conflict: The hora weapon moral choice increases Renna's loyalty by 15. Refusing hora decreases it by 5.

name: Ahmann Jardir
title: Shar'Dama Ka
description: A Krasian warrior who believes he is the chosen of Everam, destined to lead humanity against demonkind. Brilliant, ruthless, and genuinely devoted.

recruitment.description: Only available if you chose to ally with the Krasians in Act 5

signature_ability.name: Spear of Everam
signature_ability.description: Jardir channels the power of the warded spear. Devastating single-target hit that ignores all defenses.

passive_ability.name: Leader's Aura
passive_ability.description: Jardir's presence inspires the party. All party members gain +10% attack.

loyalty_dialogue.10: You fight with honor. I will acknowledge this.
loyalty_dialogue.30: Few chin warriors earn my respect. You may be one.
loyalty_dialogue.50: Everam tests us both. Walk this path with me.
loyalty_dialogue.75: Perhaps I have been too rigid in my judgments.
loyalty_dialogue.100: Shar'Dama Ka or not — you are my brother.

relationship.description: Jardir and Arlen have deep rivalry. Their combined loyalty affects a special ending.
